name: Academy of Management Journal

length.basis: double-spaced Times New Roman 12pt, 1-inch margins, inclusive of all content
length.note: Longer considered when warranted. Empirical component mandatory (conceptual pieces go to AMR).

abstract.note: <=200 words on page 2 with the title.

citation_style: AOM house author-date. In-text (Name, year); page cites with a colon (Lee, 1998: 3).

etal_rule.note: 3-6 authors: all names first cite, then et al. 7+ authors: et al. even on first cite (full names in the reference).

formatting.note: Body double-spaced; headings/subheadings 1.5. No page numbers or running heads.

figures_tables.note: Grouped at end after References (all tables first, then figures); 'Insert Table X about here' placeholder; tables built in Word; figures TIF/JPEG.

cover_letter.note: ScholarOne step; acknowledgments and AI disclosure go here.

ai_disclosure.note: Disclose any AI use in the cover letter AND in article acknowledgements; confirm you read the AOM AI policy.

distinctive_rules: Substantial empirical component mandatory (purely conceptual -> AMR).
Explanatory notes are footnotes, not endnotes.
Hypotheses stated separately, present tense, numbered, in indented italic single-spaced blocks.
References separate, alphabetical, NOT numbered; book/periodical titles boldface italic, sentence case.
Title page not included in the submission under review (added only for accepted papers).
